base_template.name: TRMM_Base v3.0
base_template.html:
<html>
<!--
TRMM_Base v3.0 - Advanced Table Controls
=========================================

This base template provides a complete JavaScript framework for building interactive,
sortable, filterable data tables with professional UI controls.

WHAT'S INCLUDED:
- Complete CSS styling for advanced table controls
- Full JavaScript framework (~600 lines) for filtering, sorting, and UI
- Utility functions (debounce, stripHtml, popover positioning)
- State management system
- Combo box filters with multi-select
- Global search across all columns
- Range filters for numeric columns
- Sticky headers
- Print button and print-optimized styling

WHAT REPORTS MUST PROVIDE:
1. HTML structure with specific IDs:
   - #loading (loading indicator)
   - #tableWrap (table container, initially hidden)
   - #tableHead (thead element)
   - #tableBody (tbody element)
   - #visibleCount, #totalCount (optional row counters)

2. Data source as JSON in <script id="data-json"> tag

3. Column definitions array:
   var columns = [
       { id: 'fieldName', title: 'Display Name', html: false,
         filter: true, selectable: true, sortable: true, ... }
   ];

4. Initialization code:
   buildHeader();
   renderBody();
   updateCount();

See CLAUDE.md for complete documentation and examples.

Source: Extracted from Device Inventory Report v1.9
-->

<head>
    <style>
        /* —— PDF page settings —— */
        @page {
            margin: 0.5in;
        }

        /* —— Color palette (theme) —— */
        :root {
            --header-bg: #2c3e50;
            --header-text: #ffffff;
            --border-color: #dddddd;
            --table-header-bg: #f2f2f2;
            --status-ready-bg: #eaf7ec;
            --status-ready-badge: #28a745;
            --status-not-ready-bg: #fbebee;
            --status-not-ready-badge: #dc3545;
            --status-unknown-bg: #fff9e6;
            --status-unknown-badge: #ffc107;
            --badge-already-bg: #17a2b8;
            --focus: #3b82f6;
            --pane-gap: 10px;
        }

        /* —— Typography & utilities (structure) —— */
        body {
            font-family: sans-serif;
            color: #333;
            font-size: 14px;
        }

        .section {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }

        .text-danger {
            color: var(--status-not-ready-badge);
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        /* —— Header layout (structure) —— */
        .report-header {
            background-color: var(--header-bg);
            color: var(--header-text);
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            position: relative;
        }

        .header-logo {
            width: 80px;
            margin-right: 25px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .header-date {
            margin-left: auto;
            text-align: right;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .report-header h1 {
            font-size: 24px;
            margin: 0 0 5px;
        }

        .report-header h2 {
            font-size: 16px;
            margin: 0;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        /* —— Print controls (structure) —— */
        .print-controls {
            position: absolute;
            top: 2px;
            right: 2px;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        .print-button {
            padding: 4px 8px;
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            color: var(--header-text);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: bold;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }

        .print-button:hover {
            background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
        }

        /* —— Advanced Table Controls (NEW in v3.0) —— */

        /* Table wrapper and basic table styling */
        .table-wrap {
            overflow-x: auto;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            margin-top: var(--pane-gap);
        }

        table.vt {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
            font-size: 12px;
        }

        table.vt th,
        table.vt td {
            padding: 6px 8px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
            vertical-align: top;
        }

        table.vt th {
            white-space: nowrap;
            background-color: var(--table-header-bg);
        }

        table.vt td {
            white-space: normal;
            background: #fff;
        }

        /* Sticky THEAD (includes global search row + column header row) */
        table.vt > thead {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            z-index: 10;
            background: #fafafa;
        }

        /* Global search row (first header row) */
        .headbar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 8px 0;
        }

        .headbar .title {
            font-weight: 600;
            opacity: 0.85;
        }

        .headbar .spacer {
            flex: 1 1 auto;
        }

        /* Global search "pill" style */
        .search-wrap {
            position: relative;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .search-input {
            width: clamp(260px, 34vw, 520px);
            padding: 6px 30px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            border-radius: 24px;
            font-size: 12px;
            outline: none;
            background: #fff;
        }

        .search-input:focus {
            border-color: var(--focus);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12);
        }

        .search-icon {
            position: absolute;
            left: 10px;
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            opacity: 0.6;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Column header structure */
        .th-inner {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 6px;
            min-height: 48px;
        }

        .th-title {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        th.sortable {
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
        }

        th.sortable .sort-ind {
            opacity: 0.6;
            margin-left: 4px;
        }

        /* Combo box filter control */
        .combo {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: #fff;
            padding: 2px 8px;
        }

        .combo:focus-within {
            border-color: var(--focus);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.12);
        }

        .combo-input {
            flex: 1 1 auto;
            border: 0;
            outline: 0;
            font-size: 12px;
            padding: 6px 6px;
            background: transparent;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .combo-right {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .combo-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            border: 0;
            background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 4px;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }

        .combo-btn:hover {
            background: #f1f5f9;
        }

        .chev {
            width: 14px;
            height: 14px;
            opacity: 0.7;
        }

        /* Selection count badge */
        .badge {
            font-size: 11px;
            padding: 2px 6px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #eef2ff;
            color: #3730a3;
            border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
        }

        /* Clear button (floating X) - different from print button */
        .clear-filter-btn {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            right: 0;
            transform: translate(50%, -50%);
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #e53e3e;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: sans-serif;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: bold;
            line-height: 18px;
            padding: 0;
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .clear-filter-btn:hover {
            background: #c53030;
        }

        .combo .clear-filter-btn {
            right: 0px;
        }

        /* Range filter inputs */
        .filter-wrap {
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .filter-input {
            width: 100%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            padding: 4px 6px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 12px;
            background: #fff;
        }

        /* Popover (filter picker with checkboxes) */
        .popover {
            position: fixed;
            min-width: 260px;
            max-width: 380px;
            max-height: 280px;
            overflow: auto;
            background: #fff;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
            padding: 8px;
            z-index: 10000;
        }

        .opt {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 4px 2px;
        }

        .opt label {
            flex: 1 1 auto;
            font-size: 12px;
        }

        /* Loading indicator */
        #loading {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 150px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
        }

        /* —— Badge shape (structure) —— */
        .status-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: #fff;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 11px;
            text-align: center;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        /* —— Stub classes for per‑report overrides —— */
        .status-ready {}
        .status-not-ready {}
        .status-unknown {}
        .badge-ready {}
        .badge-not-ready {}
        .badge-unknown {}
        .badge-already {}

        /* —— Footer layout (structure) —— */
        .report-footer {
            margin-top: 30px;
            padding-top: 15px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
            font-size: 10px;
            color: #666;
            text-align: center;
        }

        /* —— Screen-only styles (hide when printing) —— */
        @media screen {
            .print-only {
                display: none !important;
            }
        }

        /* —— Print-specific styles —— */
        @media print {
            /* Hide interactive elements when printing */
            .no-print {
                display: none !important;
            }

            /* Disable sticky so thead repeats cleanly on each page */
            table.vt > thead {
                position: static;
            }

            /* Ensure proper page breaks */
            table.vt {
                page-break-inside: auto;
            }

            table.vt tr {
                page-break-inside: avoid;
                page-break-after: auto;
            }

            table.vt thead {
                display: table-header-group;
            }

            table.vt tbody {
                display: table-row-group;
            }

            /* Optimize colors for print */
            body {
                color: #000;
                background: #fff;
            }

            .report-header {
                border-radius: 0;
                -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
                print-color-adjust: exact;
                color-adjust: exact;
            }

            .status-badge {
                border: 1px solid #333;
                -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
                print-color-adjust: exact;
                color-adjust: exact;
            }

            .status-ready,
            .status-not-ready,
            .status-unknown {
                -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
                print-color-adjust: exact;
                color-adjust: exact;
            }

            p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
                orphans: 3;
                widows: 3;
            }

            h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
                page-break-after: avoid;
            }

            .section {
                margin-top: 15px;
            }

            a[href]:after {
                content: none;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <script>
        /*
         * TRMM_Base v3.0 - Advanced Table Controls JavaScript Framework
         * ================================================================
         *
         * This framework provides complete filtering, sorting, and UI management
         * for interactive data tables. Reports using this base template need only
         * provide data and column definitions.
         *
         * ARCHITECTURE:
         * - State management: Central state object tracks all filters and sorting
         * - Data-driven: Column metadata defines table structure and behavior
         * - Event-driven: User interactions update state and trigger re-renders
         * - Client-side: All filtering and sorting happens in browser
         *
         * REQUIRED FROM REPORTS:
         * - var columns = [ ... ]  // Column definitions
         * - var data = [ ... ]     // Row data as array of objects
         * - HTML elements with specific IDs (see documentation)
         *
         * INITIALIZATION:
         * 1. Define columns array
         * 2. Load data from JSON
         * 3. Call buildHeader()
         * 4. Call renderBody()
         * 5. Call updateCount()
         *
         * See CLAUDE.md for complete documentation.
         */

        // ============================================================
        // UTILITY FUNCTIONS
        // ============================================================

        // Simple DOM selectors
        var $ = function(s, r) { return (r || document).querySelector(s); };
        var $$ = function(s, r) { return Array.prototype.slice.call((r || document).querySelectorAll(s)); };

        // Debounce function calls for performance
        var debounce = function(fn, ms) {
            var t;
            return function() {
                var a = arguments;
                clearTimeout(t);
                t = setTimeout(function() { fn.apply(null, a); }, ms || 200);
            };
        };

        // Create DOM node from HTML string
        var htmlNode = function(s) {
            var el = document.createElement('span');
            el.innerHTML = String(s || '');
            return el;
        };

        // Strip HTML tags from string (for filtering HTML content)
        var stripHtml = function(s) {
            var d = document.createElement('div');
            d.innerHTML = String(s || '');
            return d.textContent || d.innerText || '';
        };

        // ============================================================
        // STATE MANAGEMENT
        // ============================================================

        /*
         * Central state object tracks all user interactions:
         * - globalFilter: Text search across all columns
         * - columnText: Per-column text search
         * - columnSelect: Per-column multi-select values
         * - range: Min/max filters for numeric columns
         * - clientSite: Special dual filter for Client/Site columns
         * - sorting: Current sort column and direction
         * - _popoverEl: Reference to open popover (for cleanup)
         */
        var state = {
            globalFilter: '',
            columnText: {},
            columnSelect: {},
            range: {},
            clientSite: { textClient: '', textSite: '', selClient: [], selSite: [] },
            sorting: { id: null, desc: false },
            _popoverEl: null
        };

        // ============================================================
        // DATA PROCESSING FUNCTIONS
        // ============================================================

        /*
         * Locale-aware string comparison with numeric support
         */
        function compare(a, b) {
            var na = a == null ? '' : String(a);
            var nb = b == null ? '' : String(b);
            return na.localeCompare(nb, undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: 'base' });
        }

        /*
         * Extract filterable value from a row for a given column
         * Handles HTML content by stripping tags
         */
        function valueFor(row, col) {
            var key = (col.filterKey || col.id);
            var v = row[key];
            return col.html ? stripHtml(v) : v;
        }

        /*
         * Check if a row passes all active filters
         * Returns true if row should be shown, false if filtered out
         */
        function rowPassesFilters(row) {
            // Global filter (searches across all filterable columns)
            var gf = state.globalFilter.trim().toLowerCase();
            if (gf) {
                var hit = false;
                for (var i = 0; i < columns.length; i++) {
                    var c = columns[i];
                    if (!c.filter) continue;
                    if (c.special === 'clientSite') {
                        var t1 = String(row.clientRaw || '').toLowerCase();
                        var t2 = String(row.site || '').toLowerCase();
                        if (t1.indexOf(gf) > -1 || t2.indexOf(gf) > -1) {
                            hit = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    } else {
                        var t = String(valueFor(row, c) || '').toLowerCase();
                        if (t.indexOf(gf) > -1) {
                            hit = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (!hit) return false;
            }

            // Per-column filters
            for (var j = 0; j < columns.length; j++) {
                var c = columns[j];
                if (!c.filter) continue;

                // Range filter (for numeric columns)
                if (c.range) {
                    var r = state.range[c.id] || {};
                    var num = row[c.id + 'Num'] || parseFloat(row[c.id]);
                    if (r.min != null && (num == null || num < r.min)) return false;
                    if (r.max != null && (num == null || num > r.max)) return false;
                    continue;
                }

                // Special clientSite dual filter
                if (c.special === 'clientSite') {
                    var s = state.clientSite;
                    var cellClient = String(row.clientRaw || '');
                    var cellSite = String(row.site || '');
                    if (s.selClient.length > 0) {
                        if (s.selClient.indexOf(cellClient) === -1) return false;
                    } else if (s.textClient) {
                        if (cellClient.toLowerCase().indexOf(s.textClient.toLowerCase()) === -1) return false;
                    }
                    if (s.selSite.length > 0) {
                        if (s.selSite.indexOf(cellSite) === -1) return false;
                    } else if (s.textSite) {
                        if (cellSite.toLowerCase().indexOf(s.textSite.toLowerCase()) === -1) return false;
                    }
                    continue;
                }

                // Standard text/multi-select filter
                var sv = state.columnSelect[c.id] || [];
                var tv = (state.columnText[c.id] || '').toLowerCase();
                var cell = String(valueFor(row, c) || '');
                if (sv.length > 0) {
                    if (sv.indexOf(cell) === -1) return false;
                } else if (tv) {
                    if (cell.toLowerCase().indexOf(tv) === -1) return false;
                }
            }

            return true;
        }

        /*
         * Get filtered and sorted data
         * Returns array of rows that pass filters, sorted by current sort column
         */
        function getFilteredSortedData() {
            var rows = data.filter(rowPassesFilters);
            if (state.sorting.id) {
                var col = columns.find(function(c) { return c.id === state.sorting.id; });
                if (col) {
                    rows = rows.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
                        var av, bv;
                        if (col.numeric) {
                            av = a[col.id + 'Num'] != null ? a[col.id + 'Num'] : parseFloat(a[col.id]);
                            bv = b[col.id + 'Num'] != null ? b[col.id + 'Num'] : parseFloat(b[col.id]);
                            var sa = (isFinite(av) ? av : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY);
                            var sb = (isFinite(bv) ? bv : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY);
                            var d = sa - sb;
                            return state.sorting.desc ? -d : d;
                        } else {
                            av = valueFor(a, col);
                            bv = valueFor(b, col);
                            var d2 = compare(av, bv);
                            return state.sorting.desc ? -d2 : d2;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
            return rows;
        }

        /*
         * Get unique values for a column (for popover picker)
         * Returns sorted array of {v: value, c: count} objects
         */
        function uniqueValues(colId, list) {
            var col = columns.find(function(c) { return c.id === colId; });
            var m = new Map();
            for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
                var val = String(valueFor(list[i], col) || 'N/A');
                m.set(val, (m.get(val) || 0) + 1);
            }
            var arr = Array.from(m.entries()).map(function(x) {
                return { v: x[0], c: x[1] };
            });
            arr.sort(function(a, b) {
                return a.v.localeCompare(b.v, undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: 'base' });
            });
            return arr;
        }

        /*
         * Get unique values for Client/Site special column
         */
        function uniqueValuesByKey(key, list) {
            var m = new Map();
            for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
                var val = String((key === 'clientRaw' ? list[i].clientRaw : list[i].site) || 'N/A');
                m.set(val, (m.get(val) || 0) + 1);
            }
            var arr = Array.from(m.entries()).map(function(x) {
                return { v: x[0], c: x[1] };
            });
            arr.sort(function(a, b) {
                return a.v.localeCompare(b.v, undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: 'base' });
            });
            return arr;
        }

        /*
         * Get filtered rows excluding a specific column's filter
         * Used to show available values in popover when other filters are active
         */
        function filteredRowsExcluding(colId, subKey) {
            var saved = {
                columnText: Object.assign({}, state.columnText),
                columnSelect: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.columnSelect)),
                range: Object.assign({}, state.range),
                clientSite: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(state.clientSite))
            };
            if (colId === 'clientSiteHTML') {
                if (subKey === 'client') {
                    state.clientSite.selClient = [];
                    state.clientSite.textClient = '';
                }
                if (subKey === 'site') {
                    state.clientSite.selSite = [];
                    state.clientSite.textSite = '';
                }
            } else {
                state.columnSelect[colId] = [];
                state.columnText[colId] = '';
                delete state.range[colId];
            }
            var rows = data.filter(rowPassesFilters);
            state.columnText = saved.columnText;
            state.columnSelect = saved.columnSelect;
            state.range = saved.range;
            state.clientSite = saved.clientSite;
            return rows;
        }

        // ============================================================
        // UI BUILDERS
        // ============================================================

        /*
         * Build table header with global search and column filters
         * Creates two-row thead:
         * - Row 1: Global search bar spanning all columns
         * - Row 2: Column headers with individual filter controls
         */
        function buildHeader() {
            var headEl = $('#tableHead');
            if (!headEl) return;
            headEl.innerHTML = '';

            // Row 1: Global search
            var trSearch = document.createElement('tr');
            var thSearch = document.createElement('th');
            thSearch.colSpan = columns.length;

            var bar = document.createElement('div');
            bar.className = 'headbar';

            var title = document.createElement('div');
            title.className = 'title';
            title.textContent = 'Global Filter';

            var sw = document.createElement('div');
            sw.className = 'search-wrap';

            var input = document.createElement('input');
            input.id = 'globalSearch';
            input.type = 'search';
            input.className = 'search-input';
            input.placeholder = 'Type to filter table';
            input.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Search table');
            input.value = state.globalFilter || '';

            var icon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
            icon.setAttribute('class', 'search-icon');
            icon.setAttribute('viewBox', '0 0 24 24');
            icon.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
            icon.innerHTML = '<path d="M15.5 14h-.79l-.28-.27a6.5 6.5 0 1 0-.71.71l.27.28v.79L20 21.5 21.5 20l-6-6zm-6 0A4.5 4.5 0 1 1 14 9.5 4.5 4.5 0 0 1 9.5 14z"/>';

            var clearBtn = document.createElement('button');
            clearBtn.className = 'clear-filter-btn no-print';
            clearBtn.innerHTML = '×';
            clearBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Clear search');

            var toggleGlobalClear = function() {
                clearBtn.style.display = input.value ? 'flex' : 'none';
            };

            input.addEventListener('input', debounce(function(e) {
                state.globalFilter = e.target.value || '';
                toggleGlobalClear();
                renderBody();
                updateCount();
            }, 140));

            clearBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                input.value = '';
                input.focus();
                state.globalFilter = '';
                toggleGlobalClear();
                renderBody();
                updateCount();
            });

            sw.appendChild(input);
            sw.appendChild(icon);
            sw.appendChild(clearBtn);
            toggleGlobalClear();

            bar.appendChild(title);
            bar.appendChild(sw);
            var spacer = document.createElement('div');
            spacer.className = 'spacer';
            bar.appendChild(spacer);

            thSearch.appendChild(bar);
            trSearch.appendChild(thSearch);

            // Row 2: Column headers with filters
            var trCols = document.createElement('tr');

            columns.forEach(function(c) {
                var th = document.createElement('th');
                if (c.sortable) th.classList.add('sortable');

                var wrap = document.createElement('div');
                wrap.className = 'th-inner';

                var t = document.createElement('div');
                t.className = 'th-title';
                t.textContent = c.title;

                if (c.sortable) {
                    var ind = document.createElement('span');
                    ind.className = 'sort-ind';
                    ind.textContent = state.sorting.id === c.id ? (state.sorting.desc ? '▼' : '▲') : '↕';
                    t.appendChild(ind);
                    t.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        if (state.sorting.id !== c.id) {
                            state.sorting.id = c.id;
                            state.sorting.desc = false;
                        } else if (state.sorting.id === c.id && state.sorting.desc === false) {
                            state.sorting.desc = true;
                        } else {
                            state.sorting.id = null;
                            state.sorting.desc = false;
                        }
                        buildHeader();
                        renderBody();
                        updateCount();
                    });
                }

                wrap.appendChild(t);

                // Add filter control based on column type
                if (c.filter) {
                    if (c.range) {
                        // Range filter for numeric columns
                        var fw = document.createElement('div');
                        fw.className = 'filter-wrap';

                        var min = document.createElement('input');
                        min.className = 'filter-input no-print';
                        min.placeholder = 'Min';

                        var max = document.createElement('input');
                        max.className = 'filter-input no-print';
                        max.placeholder = 'Max';

                        var clearRangeBtn = document.createElement('button');
                        clearRangeBtn.className = 'clear-filter-btn no-print';
                        clearRangeBtn.innerHTML = '×';
                        clearRangeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Clear range filter for ' + c.title);

                        var toggleRangeClear = function() {
                            var hasValue = min.value.trim() !== '' || max.value.trim() !== '';
                            clearRangeBtn.style.display = hasValue ? 'flex' : 'none';
                        };

                        var apply = function() {
                            var vmin = min.value.trim() === '' ? null : parseFloat(min.value);
                            var vmax = max.value.trim() === '' ? null : parseFloat(max.value);
                            state.range[c.id] = { min: vmin, max: vmax };
                            toggleRangeClear();
                            renderBody();
                            updateCount();
                        };

                        clearRangeBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                            min.value = '';
                            max.value = '';
                            apply();
                        });

                        min.addEventListener('input', debounce(apply, 250));
                        max.addEventListener('input', debounce(apply, 250));

                        var r = state.range[c.id] || {};
                        if (r.min != null) min.value = r.min;
                        if (r.max != null) max.value = r.max;

                        fw.appendChild(min);
                        fw.appendChild(max);
                        fw.appendChild(clearRangeBtn);
                        wrap.appendChild(fw);
                        toggleRangeClear();
                    } else if (c.special === 'clientSite') {
                        // Dual filter for Client/Site
                        wrap.appendChild(buildCombo({
                            title: 'Client',
                            placeholder: 'Search client',
                            getText: function() { return state.clientSite.textClient || ''; },
                            setText: function(v) {
                                state.clientSite.textClient = v || '';
                                if (!(state.clientSite.selClient || []).length) {
                                    renderBody();
                                    updateCount();
                                }
                            },
                            getCount: function() { return (state.clientSite.selClient || []).length; },
                            open: function(btn) { togglePopoverDual('client', btn); },
                            clear: function() {
                                state.clientSite.textClient = '';
                                state.clientSite.selClient = [];
                            }
                        }));
                        wrap.appendChild(buildCombo({
                            title: 'Site',
                            placeholder: 'Search site',
                            getText: function() { return state.clientSite.textSite || ''; },
                            setText: function(v) {
                                state.clientSite.textSite = v || '';
                                if (!(state.clientSite.selSite || []).length) {
                                    renderBody();
                                    updateCount();
                                }
                            },
                            getCount: function() { return (state.clientSite.selSite || []).length; },
                            open: function(btn) { togglePopoverDual('site', btn); },
                            clear: function() {
                                state.clientSite.textSite = '';
                                state.clientSite.selSite = [];
                            }
                        }));
                    } else {
                        // Standard combo filter (text + multi-select)
                        wrap.appendChild(buildCombo({
                            title: c.title,
                            placeholder: 'Search',
                            getText: function() { return state.columnText[c.id] || ''; },
                            setText: function(v) {
                                state.columnText[c.id] = v || '';
                                if (!(state.columnSelect[c.id] || []).length) {
                                    renderBody();
                                    updateCount();
                                }
                            },
                            getCount: function() { return (state.columnSelect[c.id] || []).length; },
                            open: function(btn) { togglePopover(c.id, btn); },
                            clear: function() {
                                state.columnText[c.id] = '';
                                state.columnSelect[c.id] = [];
                            }
                        }));
                    }
                }

                th.appendChild(wrap);
                trCols.appendChild(th);
            });

            headEl.appendChild(trSearch);
            headEl.appendChild(trCols);
        }

        /*
         * Build a combo box filter control
         * opts = { title, placeholder, getText, setText, getCount, open, clear }
         */
        function buildCombo(opts) {
            var box = document.createElement('div');
            box.className = 'combo no-print';

            var input = document.createElement('input');
            input.className = 'combo-input';
            input.placeholder = opts.placeholder || 'Search';
            input.value = opts.getText();

            var right = document.createElement('div');
            right.className = 'combo-right';

            var badge = document.createElement('span');
            badge.className = 'badge';
            var count = opts.getCount();
            badge.textContent = count > 0 ? String(count) + ' selected' : 'Pick';
            if (count === 0) badge.style.display = 'none';

            var btn = document.createElement('button');
            btn.type = 'button';
            btn.className = 'combo-btn';
            btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Pick values');
            btn.innerHTML = '<svg class="chev" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M7 10l5 5 5-5z"/></svg>';
            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                opts.open(btn);
            });

            var clearBtn = document.createElement('button');
            clearBtn.className = 'clear-filter-btn';
            clearBtn.innerHTML = '×';
            clearBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Clear filter for ' + opts.title);

            var toggleClearBtn = function() {
                var hasText = input.value.trim() !== '';
                var hasSelection = opts.getCount() > 0;
                clearBtn.style.display = (hasText || hasSelection) ? 'flex' : 'none';
            };

            clearBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                input.value = '';
                opts.clear();
                box._updateBadge(0);
                renderBody();
                updateCount();
            });

            input.addEventListener('input', debounce(function(e) {
                opts.setText(e.target.value || '');
                toggleClearBtn();
            }, 120));

            box._updateBadge = function(n) {
                if (n > 0) {
                    badge.style.display = 'inline-block';
                    badge.textContent = n + ' selected';
                } else {
                    badge.style.display = 'none';
                }
                toggleClearBtn();
            };

            right.appendChild(badge);
            right.appendChild(btn);
            box.appendChild(input);
            box.appendChild(clearBtn);
            box.appendChild(right);
            toggleClearBtn();
            return box;
        }

        // ============================================================
        // POPOVER HANDLERS
        // ============================================================

        /*
         * Position popover below anchor button, keeping it in viewport
         */
        function placePopoverUnder(anchorBtn, pop) {
            var rect = anchorBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
            var left = rect.left;
            var top = rect.bottom + 6;

            document.body.appendChild(pop);
            var pw = pop.offsetWidth,
                ph = pop.offsetHeight;

            if (left + pw > window.innerWidth - 8) {
                left = Math.max(8, window.innerWidth - pw - 8);
            }
            if (top + ph > window.innerHeight - 8) {
                var altTop = rect.top - ph - 6;
                top = (altTop >= 8) ? altTop : Math.max(8, window.innerHeight - ph - 8);
            }

            pop.style.left = left + 'px';
            pop.style.top = top + 'px';
        }

        /*
         * Toggle popover for Client/Site dual filter
         */
        function togglePopoverDual(kind, anchorBtn) {
            closePopover();
            anchorBtn.classList.add('active');

            var pop = document.createElement('div');
            pop.className = 'popover no-print';
            var list = document.createElement('div');
            pop.appendChild(list);
            var baseRows = filteredRowsExcluding('clientSiteHTML', kind);

            function renderList() {
                list.innerHTML = '';
                var items = uniqueValuesByKey(kind === 'client' ? 'clientRaw' : 'site', baseRows);
                var selArr = (kind === 'client' ? (state.clientSite.selClient || []) : (state.clientSite.selSite || []));

                items.forEach(function(it) {
                    var row = document.createElement('div');
                    row.className = 'opt';
                    var cb = document.createElement('input');
                    cb.type = 'checkbox';
                    cb.value = it.v;
                    cb.checked = selArr.indexOf(it.v) > -1;
                    var lab = document.createElement('label');
                    lab.textContent = it.v + ' (' + it.c + ')';

                    cb.addEventListener('change', function(e) {
                        var arr = (kind === 'client' ? state.clientSite.selClient : state.clientSite.selSite);
                        var v = e.target.value;
                        if (e.target.checked) {
                            if (arr.indexOf(v) === -1) arr.push(v);
                        } else {
                            var idx = arr.indexOf(v);
                            if (idx > -1) arr.splice(idx, 1);
                        }

                        renderBody();
                        updateCount();
                        var combo = anchorBtn.closest('.combo');
                        if (combo && combo._updateBadge) combo._updateBadge(arr.length);
                    });

                    row.appendChild(cb);
                    row.appendChild(lab);
                    list.appendChild(row);
                });
            }
            renderList();

            placePopoverUnder(anchorBtn, pop);

            function closeOnOutside(e) {
                if (!pop.contains(e.target) && e.target !== anchorBtn) {
                    closePopover();
                }
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousedown', closeOnOutside);
            pop._closeHandler = closeOnOutside;
            pop._anchor = anchorBtn;
            state._popoverEl = pop;
        }

        /*
         * Toggle popover for standard column filter
         */
        function togglePopover(colId, anchorBtn) {
            closePopover();
            anchorBtn.classList.add('active');

            var pop = document.createElement('div');
            pop.className = 'popover no-print';
            var list = document.createElement('div');
            pop.appendChild(list);
            var baseRows = filteredRowsExcluding(colId);

            function renderList() {
                list.innerHTML = '';
                var items = uniqueValues(colId, baseRows);
                var selArr = (state.columnSelect[colId] || []);

                items.forEach(function(it) {
                    var row = document.createElement('div');
                    row.className = 'opt';
                    var cb = document.createElement('input');
                    cb.type = 'checkbox';
                    cb.value = it.v;
                    cb.checked = selArr.indexOf(it.v) > -1;
                    var lab = document.createElement('label');
                    lab.textContent = it.v + ' (' + it.c + ')';

                    cb.addEventListener('change', function(e) {
                        var cur = state.columnSelect[colId] || [];
                        var v = e.target.value;
                        if (e.target.checked) {
                            if (cur.indexOf(v) === -1) cur.push(v);
                        } else {
                            var idx = cur.indexOf(v);
                            if (idx > -1) cur.splice(idx, 1);
                        }
                        state.columnSelect[colId] = cur;

                        renderBody();
                        updateCount();
                        var combo = anchorBtn.closest('.combo');
                        if (combo && combo._updateBadge) combo._updateBadge(cur.length);
                    });

                    row.appendChild(cb);
                    row.appendChild(lab);
                    list.appendChild(row);
                });
            }
            renderList();

            placePopoverUnder(anchorBtn, pop);

            function closeOnOutside(e) {
                if (!pop.contains(e.target) && e.target !== anchorBtn) {
                    closePopover();
                }
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousedown', closeOnOutside);
            pop._closeHandler = closeOnOutside;
            pop._anchor = anchorBtn;
            state._popoverEl = pop;
        }

        /*
         * Close any open popover
         */
        function closePopover() {
            var pop = state._popoverEl;
            if (pop) {
                document.removeEventListener('mousedown', pop._closeHandler || function() {});
                if (pop._anchor) pop._anchor.classList.remove('active');
                pop.remove();
                state._popoverEl = null;
            }
        }

        // ============================================================
        // RENDERING FUNCTIONS
        // ============================================================

        /*
         * Render table body from filtered and sorted data
         */
        function renderBody() {
            var bodyEl = $('#tableBody');
            if (!bodyEl) return;
            bodyEl.innerHTML = '';
            var rows = getFilteredSortedData();
            for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
                var r = rows[i];
                var tr = document.createElement('tr');
                for (var c = 0; c < columns.length; c++) {
                    var col = columns[c];
                    var td = document.createElement('td');
                    var val = r[col.id];
                    if (col.html) {
                        td.appendChild(htmlNode(val));
                    } else {
                        td.textContent = val != null ? val : '';
                    }
                    tr.appendChild(td);
                }
                bodyEl.appendChild(tr);
            }
        }

        /*
         * Update row counter (if elements exist)
         */
        function updateCount() {
            var visibleEl = $('#visibleCount');
            var totalEl = $('#totalCount');
            if (visibleEl) {
                visibleEl.textContent = String(getFilteredSortedData().length);
            }
            if (totalEl && typeof data !== 'undefined') {
                totalEl.textContent = String(data.length);
            }
        }

        /*
         * INITIALIZATION TEMPLATE:
         *
         * Reports should include code like this after defining columns and loading data:
         *
         * // Preprocess data if needed (e.g., parse numbers, strip HTML)
         * for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
         *     // Extract numeric values for range filtering
         *     var m = String(data[i].ram || '').match(/\d+/);
         *     data[i].ramNum = m ? parseFloat(m[0]) : null;
         *     // Strip HTML for text filtering
         *     data[i].fieldText = stripHtml(data[i].fieldHTML);
         * }
         *
         * // Build UI and render
         * buildHeader();
         * renderBody();
         * updateCount();
         *
         * // Show table (hide loading indicator)
         * $('#loading').style.display = 'none';
         * $('#tableWrap').style.display = 'block';
         */
    </script>
</head>

<body>
    <div class="report-header">
        <div class="header-logo">
            <img src="https://github.com/amidaware/reporting-templates/blob/master/assets/gbtnavy%20(256).png?raw=true"
                 alt="Logo" style="width: 80px; height: auto;">
        </div>
        <div class="header-titles">
            {% block header_title %}{% endblock %}
        </div>
        <div class="header-date">
            <h2>Report Date:<br>{{ report_run_timestamp.strftime('%B %d, %Y') }}</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="print-controls no-print">
            <button onclick="window.print()" class="print-button">🖨️ Print</button>
        </div>
    </div>
    {% block content %}{% endblock %}
    <div class="report-footer">
        {% block footer %}{% endblock %}
    </div>
</body>

</html>

template.name: Agents_Filtered by RAM (md) v3.0
template.template_variables:
data_sources:
  agents:
    model: agent
    only:
    - hostname
    - site__name
    - site__client__name
    - last_logged_in_user
    - operating_system
    - wmi_detail
    - total_ram
    - disks
report_run_timestamp: !now
